issue_body_preview:
**Describe the bug**
i was following this page https://github.com/zxing-js/ngx-scanner/wiki/Getting-Started for the integration of ngx-scanner with my angular 9 app. its bringing the camera on my mac os, but not recognizing the QRCode

Angular version 9
Node 12.11.1
test_description_zh: 在 Angular 9 应用中集成 ngx-scanner 组件，打开摄像头后将二维码（QR Code）放置在摄像头前，观察扫描组件是否能成功识别并返回扫描结果。
expected_result_zh: 摄像头正常启动后，将 QR Code 置于摄像头可视范围内，扫描组件应能成功识别二维码内容，并通过 scanSuccess 事件正确输出解码结果。
